notes: ⌘T now starts an agent — it opens the launcher on the project you are in, and Enter starts the agent you used last. A plain new terminal moves to ⌘⇧T, and the Trail panel moves to ⌘⇧L. Projects you pin (⌘⇧O, or the pin on a project header) now outlive their terminals and survive a quit, so a lane you care about stays in the sidebar with nothing running in it. The launcher is a picker rather than a second sidebar: one gesture per project, an agent list that scales, and it opens only when you ask for it. The sidebar itself is quieter — a project is its name and its branch, and the + on a hovered header is the way in.
